title: KarriereDagene NTNU 2025
description: Norway's largest student-run career fair. Connect with over 200 companies across technology, engineering, finance, and more. Perfect for students and recent graduates looking for internships or full-time positions.

title: UiO Career Fair 2025
description: Annual career fair at University of Oslo featuring employers from various sectors. Great opportunity for students to explore career paths and connect with potential employers.

title: Springbrettet Karrieredagen 2025
description: Bergen's premier career fair for students. Meet employers from technology, consulting, finance, and more. Excellent networking opportunities for young professionals starting their careers.

title: Tech Career Development Meetup
description: Join fellow tech professionals and enthusiasts for an evening of networking and career development discussions. Learn about career paths in technology and connect with industry professionals.

title: Oslo Tech Show 2026
description: Norway's leading technology expo and conference. Explore the latest innovations, attend talks from industry leaders, and discover career opportunities in the tech sector.

title: NDC Oslo 2026
description: One of Europe's largest conferences for software developers. Five days of workshops, talks, and networking with thousands of developers. Excellent for learning new skills and career advancement.

title: Oslo Innovation Week 2026
description: A week-long festival of innovation, entrepreneurship, and technology. Features hundreds of events across Oslo covering startups, sustainability, tech, and career development.
